assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Step 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to get cluster versions, node pool versions, node status, pod status, and health checks

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=us-west1-b --format="yaml(validMasterVersions)"' and verification commands for available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: No API deprecation check commands are included in the runbook, which is critical for upgrade planning

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 3.1 provides the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --master --cluster-version=1.33 --zone=us-west1-b'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 3.2 includes monitoring commands and verification of master version with 'gcloud container clusters describe' command

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 4.1 and 4.3 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools with 'gcloud container clusters upgrade --node-pool' commands

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 4.2 and 4.4 include while loops to monitor upgrade progress with status checks and node status monitoring

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Runbook shows direct upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane and allows node pools to upgrade directly to match master version

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Step 5 includes comprehensive validation with node version checks, pod health checks, kube-system pod status, and deployment status verification

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: While troubleshooting commands are provided, there is no specific rollback section with step-by-step rollback procedures or commands
